title: Inversion 倒裝句
formula: Negative or limiting expression + auxiliary verb / modal verb / be + subject + remaining information

formulas.formula: Negative or limiting expression + auxiliary verb / modal verb / be + subject + remaining information
Negative expression + do / does / did + subject + base verb

formulas.labelEn: With an existing auxiliary, modal or be
formulas.labelZh: 句子已有助動詞、情態動詞或 be 動詞
formulas.formula: Negative expression + existing auxiliary / modal / be + subject + remaining information

example: Seldom do I reflect on the meaning of my own life.
exampleZh: 我很少反思自己人生的意義。

examples.en: Seldom do I reflect on the meaning of my own life.
examples.zh: 我很少反思自己人生的意義。

examples.en: Rarely does Mia complain about her homework.
Never should you share your password.
Only after the teacher gave another example did I understand the rule.
examples.zh: 直到老師再舉一個例子後，我才明白那條規則。
examples.highlight: Only after the teacher gave another example did I understand

meaning.zh: 當否定或限制意思的副詞、短語或子句移到句首時，主要子句通常需要倒裝。

rules.zh: 本練習測試句式，而不是同義詞轉換；原句使用哪一個否定或限制語，答案便必須保留哪一個。
rules.en: This exercise tests sentence structure, not synonym replacement. Preserve the exact negative or limiting expression from the source.
examples: Barely had the train left the station when the rain began.

rules.zh: 一般主要動詞需要加入 do、does 或 did，並把主要動詞改回原形。
rules.en: Add do, does or did when necessary, and use the base form of the main verb.
examples: Rarely does Mia complain about her homework.

rules.zh: 如句子已有助動詞、情態動詞或 be 動詞，便把它移到主語前，不應再加入 do、does 或 did。
rules.en: Move an existing auxiliary, modal or be verb before the subject; do not add do, does or did.
examples: Never should you share your password.
Rarely is the library this quiet.

rules.zh: Only 置前後，只倒裝主要子句；after、when 或 if 後面的子句維持正常語序。
rules.en: After initial Only, invert only the main clause, not the clause immediately following after, when or if.
examples: Only after the teacher gave another example did I understand the rule.

rules.zh: Not until 置前後，只倒裝主要子句；until 後面的子句維持正常語序。
rules.en: After initial Not until, invert only the main clause; keep the clause following until in normal word order.
examples: Not until I began working night shifts did I appreciate the value of sleep.

rules.zh: 保留正確的配對連接詞及原句副詞，例如 No sooner...than...、Hardly...when...、Scarcely...when... 和 Barely...when...。
rules.en: Keep the correct paired connector and do not replace the original adverb.
examples: No sooner had I sat down than the phone rang.
Hardly had the doors opened when the crowd moved forward.

rules.zh: Not only 放在句首時需要倒裝，而且只有第一個子句需要倒裝。
rules.en: Not only at the beginning requires inversion in the first clause only.
examples: Not only does the new app save time, but it also reduces paperwork.

rules.zh: 本練習集中處理由否定或限制語引起的倒裝，不包括條件倒裝、地點倒裝或 so / such 結果倒裝。
rules.en: This exercise covers inversion caused by negative or limiting expressions, not conditional, place or result inversion.

benefits.zh: 以 Never、Under no circumstances 或 On no account 開始句子，可以立即突出警告或限制。
Only after、Not until、Barely...when... 和 No sooner...than... 可以更清楚表達事情發生的時間。
benefits.en: It makes the timing between events clearer.

benefits.zh: 你不需要每句都以主語開始，也可以先寫出最值得注意的意思。
benefits.en: It gives you another way to begin a sentence.

benefits.zh: At no time、In no way 和 Under no circumstances 適合用於正式警告及論述。
benefits.en: It is useful for formal warnings and arguments.

benefits.zh: 配對倒裝結構可以把兩件緊接發生的事情組織在同一句中。
benefits.en: It helps connect two closely related events.

benefits.zh: 掌握固定倒裝框架後，可以更快組織說話及寫作內容。
benefits.en: It provides a useful speaking and writing frame.

en: Rewrite each sentence by moving the exact negative or limiting expression to the beginning and using inversion.
Do not replace any word with a synonym.
Preserve the original meaning, tense, modal meaning and vocabulary.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 把原句的否定或限制語完整地移到句首，並使用倒裝句改寫。
不得把任何詞語改成近義詞。
答案必須保留原句的意思、時態、情態意思及詞彙。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。
